title: 2PCS SDS Drill Bit Adapters, 6.35mm 1/4 Inch Hex Socket Drill Holder Converter SDS Socket Adaptor Set Round Shank to Hexagonal Shank Quick Change Conversion Tool for Power Drills Hammer Drills
features: Package Contents: This set includes 2 high-quality SDS chuck adapters, providing the perfect solution for DIY woodworking, machine repairs, and carpentry projects. Ideal for various drilling tasks

Premium Steel Construction: Crafted from premium steel, these drill bit holders offer high hardness and strength. The smooth, burr-free surface ensures they won't break or deform, holding your drill bit securely during demanding tasks
Ideal Assistant: With its compact design, this drill chuck adapter is lightweight and easy to carry. Take it on the go to ensure efficient work on-site or in your workshop, completing jobs with ease

Universal Compatibility: Our drill bit holders is compatible with all standard SDS drills, screwdrivers, and chucks. It allows for easy conversion from round to hexagonal shank, making it versatile for use with various tools that require hexagonal sockets or drill heads

Wide Application: This SDS drill chuck adapter is perfect for hammer drills with square drill chucks, light air hammers, and other similar devices, expanding your toolset and enhancing your project capabilities
description: Product Name: 2-Pack SDS Drill Chuck Adapters Color: Silver Quantity: 2 pieces Size: ‎6 x 3 x 1cm Material: Bearing Steel Function: Allows easy conversion between round and hexagonal shank, securely holds drill bits in place during use, ensuring reliable performance Purpose: Ideal for use in woodworking, carpentry, machine repairs, and DIY projects, this adapter enhances the versatility and compatibility of your existing tools
